tasks.name: Daily day trader prospect scan
tasks.description: Scan Reddit and X for day traders posting pain signals during pre-market and market hours
acceptance_criteria: All results pass pre_flight_check (DNC, consent, cooldown, fields)
No PII transmitted without SHA-256 hashing
All external calls routed through EventDispatcher
Status report written to orchestrator within 60 seconds
scan_runs row marked complete with found/qualified/stored counts

tasks.name: Evening after-hours scan
tasks.description: Scan for post-market venting — traders processing the day's losses
acceptance_criteria: Reddit subreddits scanned for end-of-day pain signals
New prospects merged with existing (no duplicates via dedup)

tasks.name: Calendly booking poll
tasks.description: Poll Calendly for new discovery call bookings
acceptance_criteria: New bookings matched to prospects within 15 minutes
Deal stage updated via EventDispatcher only
Pre-call brief generated for every new booking
